star_1.text: TOTALLY UNRECOMMENDED. DO NOT DOWNLOAD IT. If i havent spent money on this game, I would have uninstalled it already. The gameplay is boring.. The pathfinding of heroes and other units (especially BOMBER) are really not make any sense. They seemed to have mind on their own. Making the control of the units painstakingly crazy. FIX THIS!!! Heroes are very easy to die, even at 65 level (and i bought all 4 heroes on the market).. Farmings are headachingly SUPER HARD.. This game is rubbish..

This game is fun and exhilarating the first week you play. The ingame combat is one of the best. But it becomes monotonous and just attacking strangers who you've never met ingame How to fix this: This might be hard, but consider making an mmo map like in brutal age, were everyone has an outpost hut, in that outpost hut, their kingdom. The experience of knowing that you should not attack your neighbours and waiting while your soldiers are travelling to someone's outpost adds the exhilar

Very nice game. What kills it, the greed. No way to obtain gems in game. Got to buy. I would give this zero if the option was available. The way this game is constructed is to, "EMPTY YOUR POCKET". Sad to say this is the worst gameplay in this type of games. Finally decided to uninstall.

I have never played a game like this where I've been attacked so much so early on. Literally 3 attacks in 15 minutes. Dozens a day! I never had a chance to do anything. Outrageously unbalanced! You will NOT be getting any $ from me. This game is a greedy joke. When money is your only friend, you will find yourself all alone. And its exactly what you deserve.

Game play is quite good. It actually rivals COC. However there has been no update since 2019. Developers refuse to give support, but they keep the purchase department open. People still pour money into this game as evidenced by the rash of new players with rushed bases. A player cannot retrieve a lost base if they uninstall. The link to Google play to retrieve a base does not work. It's a lame duck game. Beware when the developer contact address is located in Cyprus! Player beware!

Great game play. Developers have abandoned the game. It's all about in app purchases. They will send an occasional email reply to complaints, but there is no follow-up action. Do not install. Save your time and money by playing a game that is supported by its developers.

Too much time taken to upgrade....like level 3 upgrade takes 45 minutes and there should be at least 5 minutes free skip in building.... getting gems is also hard....only way to complete achievements if you don't want to spend a single penny.
it's screwed up I purchased a 7 day shield yesterday and it is now on 5days 15hours how does that happen

The game is good. The game support is absolutely worthless. They take ages to reply with automated msgs. Invest your hard-earned money at your own risk. Also the pricing of in-app gems varies from country to country. Make of that what you will.

I tried to like this game, most of us in our clan did. It has been years since they updated the game and unanswered emails to simple request. I don't want to believe this game is just running to run, but it sure feels like it. Shame.
No developer support. Unable to retrieve any of my three accounts. Yet, the developer is still willing to accept our cash for in app purchases! Save your time and money and don't bother installing
Game only gets a 1 star due to the lack of response on getting any help on losing an old account that I been trying to recover. Had to start game progress all over after switching to a new phone.

This game zuck!!If you want to know every game like this has a more interesting troops!When i upgrade the troops the colour or skin of the troops not change!!! Like another game the troops will change colour after we upgrade it.For more information look at YT at game name cloud raiders!!
Once you reach TH level 4, you get paired with TH level 10 and higher in Pvp battles.. It's not fair. You should pair TH with the same levels against each other.. Please fix.. 🙄

Takes a long time to get resources to upgrade. Once you start saving enough for upgrade the game is rigged to have it taken from you after you turn game off. They say you are supposed to receive shield, but you don't

star_2.text: I enjoy playing the game and was ready to start building the new buildings that were released and now the servers are down and unable to load the game when the servers were fine this morning. When this issue is fixed I will change my review back to 5 stars. In the future I would recommend a notice that the servers will be down for maintenance at a specific time.

The game has the right idea, but keeping resources is next to impossible. The second your shield runs out you get attacked... Multiple times. And upgrades are an absolute nightmare because of it. I really tried to like this game, but it's just way too tedious. Oh, and the single player journey map STILL isn't finished... Hello? Devs?

I made a new account with the same email and when I tried to invite a friend from Facebook, a thing popped up to switch to my old base. I did because I thought I could switch back. Turns out I can't, and I lost all progress on the current base. please fix.

As far as the game itself goes..I would give it 4 stars. But I just can't do that now, since I figured out how this game completely ripped off Clash of Clans. I mean look at the units health and attack etc and you will see they copied every detail from Clash of Clans. It's the same with the defenses. At every level they are the same too.It's like they coudn't think of anything themselves. So therefore I don't think they deserve any stars.

Great game and graphics...sad but true pay to win game. Haven't even upgraded to level 5 before I am dominated by other player's. Nor can I ever have enough resouces to build everything, keeps ya just short enough, than it's pay to win/build.

I tried to merge 2 newer kingdoms with my older kingdom on a newer device and both newer kingdoms disappeared! Tried to restart game but nothing. I sent 2 emails asking to restore my 2 baby kingdoms but no reply yet. OK so 2 months later I was able to regain my bigger kingdom on my new phone but lost my smaller kingdom on my tablet. So I have had to restart a new kingdom on my tablet. Bummer Also keeping resources is a joke as you can be attacked multiple times before a shield is applied.

Have played for a year now and been in outstanding clan. Game play same as CoC recommend to players for this type of games. I now can't load game on on any device, each time I click allow i return to the "Allow" window repeating . RESTARTING is not a option.

Game is good but upgrading takes a lot of time means it takes 3 days to update any canons or anything before I was buying something but now I don't think buying and then spending in this game is not good.

attacking is extremely difficult at the lower levels. the game seems incredibly weighted towards defence over attack (80-90% of attacls my base easily defeats). needs more balancing particularly at lower levels

According to me, after making this game, this company has forgotten to add new updates and add Town Hall 11 in it. If it continues like this then I will stop playing the log. This game is really interesting if it is updated. So I request to icestones to update it.
Constant attacks and no real story, rhyme or reason. Poor game and badly in need of some care. I'll pop back but until then you can feed on my flesh not my cash. Unistalled

im have problems with the save game every time i tried to sync my game on to another phone via facebook the game gave a message said "your game is on another account" even though my account is not active on my old phone that is useless or lost if you can fix the account problem i'll improve the ratings

Please don't put same things like clash of clans, bring something new and unique ideas other than clash of clans copy. Game is good but we need the game to improve more and more plz bring a good update soon.

can you guys come up with some sort of weapon to fend off phantoms...they just overpowered...something that would slow down movement and allow other guns to fire at them for a while....(if u kno what I'm trying to say)
So far its ok but not gamer friendly like clash of clans,it is difficult to understand specially the wars,there needs to be an explanation in wars telling new players how wars work.

Graphics are very poor as compare to clash of clan i didn't know what is the level of opponent cannon when i am attacking in multiplayer. Game will be better if graphics are very high and you need no zoom to see what is this thing.

Good game - starting to notice various Mal formed in game ads which (at least on a tablet) won't allow you to do anything apart from install the additional app the in game ad is advertising - work around is to completely close sky clash and restart.
No daily. 1 or2 crystal payout for watching videos or completing tasks. That's bull____. They are selling things that should be a part of the game. P2p otherwise it would be good.
The game great but lots of improvement producing army i hope there is a queue so that no need selecting 1 by 1 army troops again.
Good so far. Hope they continue to add content. Updated 7.19.20 not loading for 2 days now. Any update?

star_3.text: Game is addictive and fun playing with friends. Relaxed with 2 x attacks in each war makes it a easy game without the stress. Would be nice if we could have a update sometime soon. The journey map is stuck at 94% and its been like that for a long time. Please update and let us continue with the game. Right now it seems to be a money pit without much input from the developers. Will give 5 stars once thats done

Not a bad game at all. Interesting concept, although, the same game mechanics as clash of clans. However a different world with its own characters. A bit tough to login and keep a consistent play. Resources are a bit lacked, it's okay. 3 out of 5!

I actually like the game, but can you possibly make sure in the next update, that if you attack players you can choose which targets to destroy first, i can't stand how it is now.. too easy to die, ai is stupid when you attack other bases, you should be able to go after base defenses first

OK game... it's your typical castle defense game where they try and get you to buy diamonds to do anything. So needless to say if you don't dish out a lot of $$$, you'll basically sit and wait forever to do anything.

I like this game!! But one thing that I dont like is when we upgrade the troops,it not changing colour or something else!! It look same!! I hope you can make like what I said in another update!! Or I will delete this game with all my friend that I ask to play too!! I have 100 friend that play this game!! All from my school!

I hope this game will have an update. I wish you could include daily quests or trophy tournaments or some activities or events not only clan wars. Because right after you have looted and upgrade your base, that's the end of entertainment. The game is cool but later became boring.
Can't login again have to leep uninstalling & reinstalling for it to let me login. Theres is a real problem with this game that needs sorting. Its a good game so its a shame.

This game is a very nice one, compared to some sky,quality graphics and sounds ,no ads it would hve been rated 5 but tje game keeps stopping anytime u are about to a battle,and l think that should be fixed

Not bad , just have to increase townhall levels BY a couple times and I wish we had something , like a device to make the abandoned windmills work or a solar panel maybe . I expect a new base to emerge as the old one seems pretty outdated . An experience to play as a Zorg can be worth it

could do with more content for example being able to finish journey, more upgrades, more troops and the daily reward which we have been waiting for for ages
Game graphics and all features are good but they need upgrade the game with some new stuff.
it good graphics, no lag. just b needs to improve the zoom in, because after zooming max the characters still too small
It's OK but it would be better if we can send friend request and know which members and friends are online in the game without connecting to facebook
Good game except hero are to costly and they all cost diamonds even to upgrade if this changes the game would take a big leap
Needs improvement. Too derivative of Clash of Clans and Plunder Pirates. I liked the steampunk elements, the unique Zorg antagonists, and the concept of an archipelago in the sky.
Fun game which is actually like many others. The 3D effect is cool bht makes it slow on some of the older phones.
Loved this game but the troops you get it after upgrading are not more powerful than the previous , some of them are only good
hard to tell the difference between buildings. slow play. but I'm still playing it. LOL

star_4.text: The graphics are great, the units or fun, but it's a mass attack game. Make as many as you can and go for it. Resources are generous and easy to come by. This is also an offense oriented game. You will get attacked constantly (my record is 6 defenses in 8 hours). Some of the timers could use adjusting, especially in single player mode. All in all, is worth a try.

Great game including graphics, troop and building design, and uniqueness. It is in need of an army preset for quick re-training after battles, the ability to rotate buildings, and base layout feature. The Zeppelins really need a speed boost though, as they get killed before they can do anything. But the game is great overall, and the premium currency is easy to get. Would like decorations to be cheaper though, or regular currency.

This is a good game but to get extra gems you watch adds, that's ok, but now they are stacking adds so you watch 2 or 3 adds for 2 gems. Then when leaving you have to go through 3 screens to check out. You spend more time watching adds than playing the game. :(

I love this game, the steam punk concept is awesome. The gameplay is simple but fun and addictive. It is similar to other games of the genre like COC, COL, etc. but I find this game to be better when visual designs are concerned: you can zoom in and view your base from any angle which is really cool. I wanted to invest some money but it hasn't been updated since 2019 so I'm quite skeptical. If you're reading this, dear developers please update the game.

A similar game to others and if you like this sort of game it is wonderful. Really smooth gameplay, lovely 3D, Perfectly possible to play for free just slower to progress unlike other games I have given up on. Only reason I didn't give it 5 stars is lack of forum backup, lack of facebook page backup, generally when I play these sorts of games a big part is the social interaction on the other platforms.

Its Good But sometimes it is laggy when you tried visiting other bases and attacking bases,,Btw I love the graphic and the mechanic of the games,,Keep it up and I hope you will going to update this games,,and Fix some problems and be sure to not result a negative effect after updating,,,,because it can cause of lot of complain if that happened.

Not too bad could be a little better, and takes to long and too many gems to upgrade and too hard to get the gems, but if you want to pay to play im sure it's like every other game and you can't chat or join clans till you get the hanger complete....is what it is though.

Good game, nice alternative to clash of clans. Would give it 5 stars but the build times and training times need a massive adjustment. Game play is good, graphics are good, love the adjustable camera angles. All in all a good game. If the build times and troop training times are reduced, could become a huge game

I am enjoying the game very much. A lot better from coc for me personally. But the only problem is that the game often crashes and goes to the home screen. please fix this problem, because it's going to be a heavy problem if the game crashes during a clan battle moment. Please fix the servers in this case. Other than that, I Iam enjoying the game very much... Would definitely give a 5* if this problem is fixed...

All right I will be honest with review....first of all game is not that bad itself....but few problems are as mentioned. 1. You can't use perticular building or weapon when upgrade was performed....this is very bad point..on one side you make upgrade too much time consuming...and on other side you can't even produce or use building.... example you can't produce fighters when building is upgrading... 2. There should be a perticular clan icon and clan shop facilities. 3. Clan wars are lame.

The best clash of clans clone. I loved it. But now it won't load anymore. Claims cannot connect to server. Yet i still got messages from server. So server ain't down. Reinstalling does not help either. Must be be a programming mistake, as ithers experienced this too. Shame. The game itself is 5 stars.

I enjoyed the game. Good graphics, neat gameplay, not-so-complicated mechanics. The reason why I gave a 4 star is that, I haven't invested my time in this game yet. I might or might not change my rating later on. We'll have to see.

The game is good but Needs more improvement about lagging it has too much lag unlike coc and why when you attack other sky village the theme is dark whats the purpose why not make it morning and also for the skylands where the land can be verry too close now when you by barrier you need to adjust just to fit it in. So much hussle and time consuming just for arranging structures. And for the last the scree view scaling plss remove the three finger scaling its annoying for hand held phone.

Great game. Similar to COC. Just a bit easier which is cool. Only thing is you get attacked by strong players the whole time. Then again if I played more I would be able to upgrade faster. All in all a good game. Well done.
hard to find adequate resources for upgrades

star_5.text: The game is great, very nice graphics and gameplay. I would be happy to se some new updates or events. Also, ranking is bit strange. You can go quickly up, but then you are stuck against way more powerful players where you have no chance. Sometimes I need to go loot only attacks to fall down in leaderboard, to match against players on my level. Otherwise perfect, just please keep developing the game :)

For me this game has much better features & game systems than coc, like clan wars for example it's very unique since not only do you attack 1 opposing clan but 3! I also love how the Singeplayer mode is given a lot more effort and story to it, heck we even get a structure solely for the campaigns :D My only suggestion is to improve your introduction and give more detail to it (perhaps cinematic quality or other similar means), since first-impression is also very important. Overall a great game!

Google Pixel 3A and no sound was heard. Then a very nice player pointed me to the little gear on the right side. By default the music check box was not selected. So now it works fine and I am loving this 3D zoom in and rotate type of play with build options. The pay for play is very reasonable and the bright colorful graphics offer a very fun immersive play experience. Try this out!

I really do love this game!! You don't have to worry about running out of energy and they make gems VEEERRYY easy to get.... Definitely NOT a pay to win game. You can purchase things if you like, but they make things easier for people who cannot and are not able to buy the things in the game to advance... GREAT JOB DEVS!!!
